Text2.label: FIRST: All restated statements required to be set forth in Articles of Incorporation (*MNPCA-6-1) are attached as Exhibit ___

Check Box4.label: FIRST: [ ] By the members at a meeting at which a quorum was present an / [ ] (If the Articles require more than a majority vote / [ ] By the written consent of all members entitled to vote with  / [ ] (If no members, or none entitled to vote thereon
Check Box4.binding_source: independent checkboxes (each on-state Yes) by geometry+text on page 0: Check Box4 y=407.4 = 'By the members at a meeting at which a quorum was present and the restatement re'; Check Box5 y=442.5 = '(If the Articles require more than a majority vote.) By the members at a meeting'; Check Box6 y=478.1 = 'By the written consent of all members entitled to vote with respect thereto.'; Check Box8 y=502.2 = '(If no members, or none entitled to vote thereon.) By majority vote of the board'. Replaces the migration-era text binding that fanned the literal enum string onto every box (non-boolean-key /Btn sweep; see tools/equivalence_check.py).

Check Box9.label: SECOND: The Registered Agent is a: (select either a Commercial or Noncommercial Registered Agent)
Check Box9.binding_source: independent checkboxes (each on-state Yes) by geometry+text on page 0: Check Box9 y=549.8 = 'Commercial Registered Agent'; Check Box10 y=611.6 = 'Noncommercial Registered Agent'. Replaces the migration-era text binding that fanned the literal type string onto both boxes (registered_agent.type checkbox-fan sweep; see tools/equivalence_check.py). The migration-era binding was also off by one widget: Check Box8 (y=502.2) is the fourth restatement.adoption_method box ('(If no members, or none entitled to vote thereon.) By majority vote of the board of directors.'), sitting above the SECOND heading - it is not a registered-agent box.
